name: Default Linux Hardening Baseline
description: Custom educational baseline for exported Linux-style configuration artifacts. This profile is not a formal CIS or NIST certification profile.

missing.title: sshd_config file is missing
missing.rationale: SSH configuration could not be assessed without the exported sshd_config file.
missing.recommendation: Export sshd_config from the target system and include it in the assessment directory.

rules.title_fail: SSH root login is not restricted
rules.rationale: Restricting direct root login reduces the risk of direct privileged remote access.
rules.recommendation: Set PermitRootLogin no unless a documented operational exception exists.

rules.title_fail: SSH password authentication is enabled or not explicitly disabled
rules.rationale: Disabling password authentication reduces exposure to password guessing and credential-stuffing attacks.
rules.recommendation: Set PasswordAuthentication no if key-based authentication is supported by the environment.

rules.title_fail: SSH empty password protection is missing
rules.rationale: Rejecting empty passwords prevents remote login for accounts with blank passwords.

rules.title_fail: SSH X11 forwarding is enabled or not explicitly disabled
rules.rationale: X11 forwarding is often unnecessary on hardened servers and may increase attack surface.

rules.title_fail: SSH authentication retries are not tightly limited
rules.rationale: Limiting authentication attempts reduces brute-force opportunity per connection.

missing.title: login.defs file is missing
missing.rationale: Password aging policy could not be assessed without login.defs.
missing.recommendation: Export login.defs from the target system and include it in the assessment directory.

rules.title_fail: Password maximum age is weak or missing
rules.rationale: Password aging can reduce the long-term exposure of compromised credentials.
rules.recommendation: Set PASS_MAX_DAYS to a value aligned with organizational policy, such as 90 days where appropriate.

rules.title_fail: Password minimum age is missing or too low
rules.rationale: A minimum password age can reduce rapid password cycling to bypass history controls.
rules.recommendation: Set PASS_MIN_DAYS to at least 1 if consistent with organizational policy.

rules.title_fail: Password minimum length is weak or missing
rules.rationale: Longer passwords generally improve resistance to guessing and cracking attacks.
rules.recommendation: Set PASS_MIN_LEN to 12 or greater if compatible with the authentication stack.

rules.title_fail: Password expiration warning is missing or too short
rules.rationale: Warning users before password expiration reduces operational disruption.
rules.recommendation: Set PASS_WARN_AGE to 7 or greater if password aging is used.

missing.title: sysctl.conf file is missing
missing.rationale: Kernel and network hardening values could not be assessed.
missing.recommendation: Export sysctl.conf or equivalent sysctl output from the target system.

rules.title_fail: IP forwarding is enabled or not explicitly disabled
rules.rationale: IP forwarding can turn a host into a router and may increase lateral movement or pivoting risk.
rules.recommendation: Set net.ipv4.ip_forward = 0 unless routing is explicitly required.

rules.title_fail: ICMP redirects are enabled or not explicitly disabled
rules.rationale: Accepting redirects can allow malicious routing manipulation in some environments.

rules.title_fail: Sending ICMP redirects is enabled or not explicitly disabled
rules.rationale: Sending redirects is generally unnecessary for hardened non-router systems.

rules.title_fail: TCP SYN cookies are disabled or not explicitly enabled
rules.rationale: SYN cookies can help improve resilience to SYN flood conditions.

missing.title: Firewall status export is missing
missing.rationale: The tool could not determine whether a host firewall appears to be enabled.
missing.recommendation: Include a firewall status export such as ufw status, firewall-cmd state, or equivalent output.

rule.title_fail: Host firewall does not appear enabled
rule.rationale: A host firewall can reduce exposed services and limit inbound traffic.
rule.recommendation: Enable and configure the host firewall according to system role and organizational policy.

missing.title: File permission inventory is missing
missing.rationale: World-writable file checks require an exported file permission inventory.
missing.recommendation: Include a CSV with columns path, owner, group, mode.

rule.title_pass: No world-writable files found in inventory
rule.rationale: World-writable files can allow unauthorized modification if located in sensitive paths.
rule.recommendation: Remove world-writable permissions unless explicitly required and documented.
